create table order_status_history ( changed_at timestamp(6) not null, changed_by bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint not null, new_status varchar(20) not null check (new_status in ('PENDING','CONFIRMED','PREPARING','READY_FOR_PICKUP','PICKED_UP','DELIVERED','CANCELLED','REFUNDED')), previous_status varchar(20) check (previous_status in ('PENDING','CONFIRMED','PREPARING','READY_FOR_PICKUP','PICKED_UP','DELIVERED','CANCELLED','REFUNDED')), notes TEXT, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table order_status_history ( changed_at timestamp(6) not null, changed_by bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint not null, new_status varchar(20) not null check (new_status in ('PENDING','CONFIRMED','PREPARING','READY_FOR_PICKUP','PICKED_UP','DELIVERED','CANCELLED','REFUNDED')), previous_status varchar(20) check (previous_status in ('PENDING','CONFIRMED','PREPARING','READY_FOR_PICKUP','PICKED_UP','DELIVERED','CANCELLED','REFUNDED')), notes TEXT, primary key (id) ) 16:38:47.321 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - testcase.name: getOrder_WithInvalidId_ShouldReturn404

error.message: Request processing failed: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Name for argument of type [java.lang.Long] not specified, and parameter name information not available via reflection. Ensure that the compiler uses the '-parameters' flag.

testcase.name: createOrder_WithInvalidRequest_ShouldReturn400

codes [NotNull.createOrderRequest.restaurantId,NotNull.restaurantId,NotNull.java.lang.Long,NotNull]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [createOrderRequest.restaurantId,restaurantId]; arguments []; default message [restaurantId]]; default message [Restaurant ID is required]] [Field error in object 'createOrderRequest' on field 'deliveryAddress': rejected value [null]; codes [NotBlank.createOrderRequest.deliveryAddress,NotBlank.deliveryAddress,NotBlank.java.lang.String,NotBlank]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [createOrderRequest.deliveryAddress,deliveryAddress]; arguments []; default message [deliveryAddress]]; default message [Delivery address is required]] [Field error in object 'createOrderRequest' on field 'orderItems': rejected value [null]; codes [NotEmpty.createOrderRequest.orderItems,NotEmpty.orderItems,NotEmpty.java.util.List,NotEmpty]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [createOrderRequest.orderItems,orderItems]; arguments []; default message [orderItems]]; default message [Order must contain at least one item]] [Field error in object 'createOrderRequest' on field 'customerId': rejected value [null]; codes [NotNull.createOrderRequest.customerId,NotNull.customerId,NotNull.java.lang.Long,NotNull]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [createOrderRequest.customerId,customerId]; arguments []; default message [customerId]]; default message [Customer ID is required]] ]
